summary: Sync command adds include_action_items, include_summary, include_transcript, include_crm_matches params for the meetings resource.
reason: Fathom's /meetings endpoint omits these fields by default. Novel commands (commitments, topics, brief, crm-gaps) require them. Without this, all novel commands return empty results.
validated_outcome: After sync, meetings have 5-15 action items and 300-500 transcript segments per meeting.
